urdu transliteration text:
Kyun Kar Juda Huwa Sare Sarwar Na Bhulna
--
english translation text: Please recite a Surah Fateha for the Marhumeen of all who made this translation possible

urdu transliteration text:
Kyun Kar Juda Huwa Sare Sarwar Na Bhulna
Gham Shahe Deen Ka Ay Dile Muztar Na Bhulna
english translation text:
Never forget, why the Master (Hussain) was decapitated (in God's Way)
O Aggrieved Heart! Never forget, the sorrow of the Leader of Faith (Hussain)

urdu transliteration text:
Jaldi Bulana Kehti Thi Sughra Padar Se Yeh
Hale Mariz Ay Mere Sarwar Na BhulnaNever forget about the state of your ill-daughter
english translation text: Sughra used to plead, Father please call for me (to join you) quickly

urdu transliteration text: Kyun Kar Juda Huwa Sare Sarwar Na Bhulna
english translation text: Never forget, why the Master (Hussain) was decapitated (in God's Way)

urdu transliteration text:
Kehti Thi Layla Bete Ki Zulfe Sanwar Kar
Layla used to say, while combing her son's hair
Mera Riyaz Ay Ali Akbar Na BhulnaNever forget my devotional-care, O Ali Akbar
Kyun Kar Juda Huwa Sare Sarwar Na Bhulna
english translation text: Never forget, why the Master (Hussain) was decapitated (in God's Way)

urdu transliteration text: Bache Ko Lekar Jab Chale Shabbir Khaime Me
english translation text:
When Shabbir left the tents, with the infant in hand
Maa Boli Meri Mehnatei Asghar Na BhulnaThe mother said, O Asghar Don't forget all my nurturing (in readying you for your role)

urdu transliteration text: Kyun Kar Juda Huwa Sare Sarwar Na Bhulna
english translation text: Never forget, why the Master (Hussain) was decapitated (in God's Way)

urdu transliteration text:
Kehthi Thi Yeh Tasawure Asghar Mei Ro Ke Maa
Dadi Ke Pas Pehlu E Madar Na BhulnaDon't forget your mother's love, in your grandmother's lap
english translation text: Asghar's mother used to say this in her inner thoughts

urdu transliteration text: Kyun Kar Juda Huwa Sare Sarwar Na Bhulna
english translation text: Never forget, why the Master (Hussain) was decapitated (in God's Way)

urdu transliteration text:
Kehta Tha Shimre Chadaare Zaynab Utaar Ke
Shimr would say, upon snatching Zainab's veil
Ay Dil Kahin Sakina Ke Guhar Na BhulnaO Self! Don't forget Sakina's earrings, too
Kyun Kar Juda Huwa Sare Sarwar Na Bhulna
english translation text: Never forget, why the Master (Hussain) was decapitated (in God's Way)

urdu transliteration text:
Maa Kehti Thi Ke Yaad Rahe Meri Tishnagi
Kausar Pe Mujh Ko Ay Ali Asghar Na BhulnaO Asghar, don't forget me at the pool of Kawthar
english translation text: The mother used to say, remember my thirst,

urdu transliteration text: Kyun Kar Juda Huwa Sare Sarwar Na Bhulna
english translation text: Never forget, why the Master (Hussain) was decapitated (in God's Way)

urdu transliteration text:
Kehta Tha Ibne Saad Ke Turbat Ko Khod Kar
Ay Shimr Kaatana Sare Asghar Na BhulnaO Shimr, don't forget to sever Asghar's head (too)
english translation text: The son of Saad would say digging up the graves

urdu transliteration text: Kyun Kar Juda Huwa Sare Sarwar Na Bhulna
english translation text: Never forget, why the Master (Hussain) was decapitated (in God's Way)
